summary: Iteration 281 - Haptic Crescendo and GEO-01 Sacred Snap Enhancement Testing. ALL NEW FEATURES WORKING: Haptic Crescendo fires progressive pulses at 25% (5ms), 50% (10ms), 75% (15ms), and final thunk at 100% (25ms). GEO-01 Qiān (Modesty) magnetic pull activates with +15% enhanced threshold at gravity 0.222. Console logs correctly show '[HAPTIC] Crescendo pulse' and '[GEO-01] Qiān (Modesty) magnetic pull activated'.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error repeatedly - KNOWN PRE-EXISTING issue
integration_issues.details: This error indicates a useEffect dependency issue causing infinite re-renders. Does not break functionality but impacts performance.

critical_code_review_comments: useTesseractCore.js: HAPTIC_CRESCENDO config correctly defines pulses at 25%, 50%, 75% with durations 5ms, 10ms, 15ms and thunk at 25ms
useTesseractCore.js: selectCell function properly tracks firedPulses Set to prevent duplicate haptic triggers
useTesseractCore.js: SACRED_GRAVITY_POINTS has Qiān at gravity 0.222 with weight: 1.15 for +15% magnetic pull
useTesseractCore.js: findNearestSnapPoint uses weighted Euclidean distance calculation (weightedThreshold = SNAP_THRESHOLD * weight)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Haptic Crescendo and GEO-01 features working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Haptic Crescendo and GEO-01 tested and working. The 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React error is a KNOWN PRE-EXISTING issue. TesseractExperience at /tesseract is the main test page. Previous features (SYNC-01, Visual Bloom, AUD-01, MEM-01) still working.

haptic_crescendo_25_percent.details: Console shows '[HAPTIC] Crescendo pulse: 5ms at 25%' during cell dwell

haptic_crescendo_50_percent.details: Console shows '[HAPTIC] Crescendo pulse: 10ms at 50%' during cell dwell

haptic_crescendo_75_percent.details: Console shows '[HAPTIC] Crescendo pulse: 15ms at 75%' during cell dwell

haptic_crescendo_100_thunk.details: Console shows '[HAPTIC] Bloom thunk: 25ms - threshold reached' at 100% dwell completion

geo01_qian_magnetic_pull.details: Console shows '[GEO-01] Qiān (Modesty) magnetic pull activated - 15% enhanced threshold' when gravity slider approaches 0.222

geo01_expanded_snap_threshold.details: Qiān has weight: 1.15 giving it 15% larger snap threshold (0.05 * 1.15 = 0.0575). Gravity snaps to 0.222 from wider range.

gravity_slider_snap_visual.details: UI shows 'Snap: Qiān (Modesty)' in top-left and 'Near: Qiān (Modesty)' at bottom when near 0.222

dwell_threshold_audio_gate.details: Console shows '[TesseractCore] Dwell threshold reached - audio bloom permitted' after 200ms dwell

mem01_persistence.details: Console shows '[MEM-01] Tesseract Anchor saved at depth: 0' - localStorage persistence working

visual_bloom_indicator.details: Green glow visible on selected cell during dwell progress

console_logs_verified: [GEO-01] Qiān (Modesty) magnetic pull activated - 15% enhanced threshold
[TesseractCore] Dwell threshold reached - audio bloom permitted

console_errors.impact: Performance degradation but does not break functionality
